name: todo
description: Optional one-command dev runner: npm run dev starts the API + SPA together via concurrently. A convenience; the standard workflow (VS F5 or dotnet run for the API, cd frontend && npm run dev for the SPA) is documented in the README.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "dotnet run --project backend/ToDoApi" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
